items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the exploratory step regarding bulk cancellation of recurring appointments.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the scenario 'Bulk cancellation of recurring appointments', but there is no concrete evidence provided in the prior steps or linked use cases that confirms this functionality has been implemented or tested. The linked use case discusses a mass reschedule scenario but does not provide specific evidence related to bulk cancellations. Therefore, the evidence is insufficient to assert a definitive conclusion regarding this requirement.
